items.title: Labor MP calls for exclusion zones at synagogues akin to abortion clinics

children.content: Former attorney-general Mark Dreyfus has pushed for more robust social media moderation and protest laws at the Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion.

articles.title: Holocaust museum staff and volunteers targeted by hateful comments

children.content: Melbourne Holocaust Museum has had to step up security since 2020 following a rise in incidents that have seen threatening voice messages and hateful comments left online.

items.title: Tribunal upholds three-match ban for Crows forward Darcy Fogarty

children.content: The Crows fail in their challenge to Darcy Fogarty's three-match striking ban at the AFL Tribunal, as the panel finds Fogarty had time to decide to swing his arm at Sydney's Harry Cunningham. Follow live.

items.title: Author Randa Abdel-Fattah sues Bendigo Writers Festival organisers

items.title: Banners at Melbourne game 'disgraceful', Football Victoria says
